title: thelypteris scabra
intro: Thelypteris scabra, also known as the rough shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris scabra include reducing swelling and pain, promoting digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, or it can be made into a tincture or poultice for topical application.
